title: Pardoning Netanyahu Now Would Be Improper, Key Israeli Office Says
summary_full: Rebuffing pressure from President Trump, a legal office says the prime minister should be pardoned only if he resigns, confesses or is convicted.
summary_public: Rebuffing pressure from President Trump, a legal office says the prime minister should be pardoned only if he resigns, confesses or is convicted.

IL.label: neutral
